channel.title: Contracting on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Contracting on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Contractor Contracts
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about contractor contracts.

item.title: Publisher Contracts
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about contracts, specifically the contracts you make with Publishers to make games.

item.title: Game Development Contracting
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about game development Contracting.
